name: error-parent-empty
description: A malformed producer sends an empty x-tapes-parent-harness-session-id. The header reader omits it (treats empty as absent), so the envelope is valid. Note: an explicit empty parent in a JSON ingest body IS rejected (400), but that is unreachable from headers.

error.rule: an empty parent header is omitted by the reader; the reject-empty rule guards the JSON body path, not headers

grounding: The reader only sets parent_harness_session_id when the header is non-empty, so an empty parent header drops out and the envelope still validates.
notes: This pins the header path specifically. The body-level validation rule (reject an explicitly-empty parent) cannot be triggered via headers because the reader never emits an empty parent.
